hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodations: Finca Ecoturistica LOS JAGUEYES in Baraya offers family rooms with private bathrooms, kitchenettes, and garden or pool views. Each room includes a sofa bed, minibar, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy a swimming pool with a view, open-air bath, and hot tub. The hotel features a restaurant, bar, and lounge, complemented by free on-site private parking and bicycle parking.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves local specialities and barbecue grill cuisines. Breakfast includes American options with fresh fruits and local delicacies.
Convenient Location: Located 45 km from Benito Salas Airport, the hotel is situated on a quiet street with inner courtyard views. Nearby attractions include the Vereda La Espinaloza and Baraya.
